name: Gediz Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Gediz Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells corrugated polypropylene (PP) sheets in Europe. Its PP sheets are used in various applications, such as separators, white appliances and electronics, automotive products, logistic products, iron works, stationary products, project bags, magazine boxes, archive boxes, vegetable fruit boxes, multipurpose boxes, recycling bins, signboards and stands, agricultural products, flower boxes, pet kennels, beehives, greenhouses, sapling shield products, and building and isolation products. The company was founded in 1982 and is based in Gediz, Turkey.
